targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS time, price FROM stock_prices WHERE symbol = 'AAPL' ORDER BY timestamp ASC
SELECT timestamp AS time, price AS "AAPL" FROM stock_prices WHERE symbol = 'AAPL' ORDER BY timestamp ASC
SELECT timestamp AS time, price AS "GOOGL" FROM stock_prices WHERE symbol = 'GOOGL' ORDER BY timestamp ASC
SELECT timestamp AS time, price AS "TSLA" FROM stock_prices WHERE symbol = 'TSLA' ORDER BY timestamp ASC
SELECT timestamp AS time, price AS "MSFT" FROM stock_prices WHERE symbol = 'MSFT' ORDER BY timestamp ASC
SELECT timestamp AS time, price AS "AMZN" FROM stock_prices WHERE symbol = 'AMZN' ORDER BY timestamp ASC
SELECT symbol, price, timestamp FROM stock_prices WHERE (symbol, timestamp) IN (SELECT symbol, MAX(timestamp) FROM stock_prices GROUP BY symbol) ORDER BY symbol ASC
